How It Works

Step 1

Explore Care Options

Get the care you need on your terms. Feeling unsure? Let our Symptoms Quiz guide you.
Step 2

Our Experts Review

If needed, a licensed medical provider will follow up same day by phone or secure chat to ensure you receive safe and effective care.
Step 3

Same-Day Pickup | FREE Delivery

Get your prescription sent to your pharmacy same day or have your care shipped FREE to your home in discreet packaging.
Step 4

Our Doors Are Always Open

Chat with our Care Team anytime. We’ve got your back.

Trusted by 1.8 Million+ Nationwide

Our Providers

Dr. Shannon Chatham, DO

Dr. Chatham is a board-certified family medicine physician who has built her career at the forefront of virtual care and digital health innovation. She earned her medical degree from the West Virginia School of Osteopathic Medicine, and completed her residency at Cornerstone Care, serving rural communities.

Andrea Sleeth, WHNP-BC, MSCP

Andrea is a women's health nurse practitioner with over a decade of experience ranging from in-office OB/GYN, bedside labor and delivery, perinatal education, and telemedicine. She graduated from Frontier Nursing University in Hyden, Kentucky where midwifery was first established in the US!

Dr. Rowena Chua, MD

Dr. Rowena Chua is a board-certified physician with more than 10 years of expertise and a passion for helping patients achieve their health goals. She has a special interest in women’s health and weight management, focusing on sustainable approaches to improve overall well-being.

Dr. Shannon Chatham, DO

Dr. Chatham is a board-certified family medicine physician who has built her career at the forefront of virtual care and digital health innovation. She earned her medical degree from the West Virginia School of Osteopathic Medicine, and completed her residency at Cornerstone Care, serving rural communities.

If you are interested in a prescription product, Wisp will assist in setting up a visit for you with an independent physician who will evaluate whether or not you are an appropriate candidate for the prescription product and if appropriate, may write you a prescription for the product which you can fill at the pharmacy of your choice.

*Images do not feature actual patients. Most prescriptions are sent to your pharmacy within 3 hours of completing your medical intake form and phone call or video chat when necessary.
